scripts.test: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:raw && npm run test:e2e:raw
scripts.test:all: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:coverage:raw && npm run test:e2e:raw && node scripts/bundle-budget.mjs && node scripts/perf-check.mjs 2>&1 | bash scripts/filter-lighthouse.sh
scripts.test:quick: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:raw && npm run test:e2e:raw
scripts.test:unit: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:raw
scripts.test:unit:coverage: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:coverage:raw
scripts.test:e2e: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:e2e:raw
scripts.test:e2e:a11y: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:e2e:a11y:raw
scripts.test:perf: npm run build && node scripts/perf-check.mjs 2>&1 | bash scripts/filter-lighthouse.sh
scripts.deploy:check: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run test:unit:coverage:raw && npm run build:only
scripts.lint: npm run prepare:codegen && npm run lint:format && npm run lint:eslint
